home.heroSubtitle: DeepContact is an AI-powered voicebot that transforms the customer service experience. Instant responses, 24/7 availability, and natural conversations.
home.featuresSubtitle: Our platform combines the latest in conversational AI to deliver an unmatched experience.
home.feature1Desc: Our voicebot understands and responds in natural language, delivering fluid and human-like conversations with your customers.
home.feature2Desc: Serve your customers at any time of the day with no wait times. Always ready, always available.
home.feature3Desc: Support in multiple languages to serve customers worldwide without communication barriers.
home.feature4Desc: Dashboard with detailed metrics on every interaction, customer satisfaction, and bot performance.
home.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to revolutionize your customer service.
home.step1Desc: Connect DeepContact to your communication channels and customize responses for your business.
home.step2Desc: Feed the voicebot with your knowledge base. The AI learns and improves with every interaction.
home.step3Desc: Activate the voicebot and start serving customers automatically and intelligently.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your customer service?
home.ctaDesc: Join the companies already trusting DeepContact to deliver an exceptional experience.

about.heroSubtitle: We automate contact and collections with artificial intelligence so your company can reach more clients, in less time and at a lower operational cost.
about.missionText: Our mission is to transform the way companies communicate with their clients, using artificial intelligence that acts immediately, persistently, and in a highly personalized manner. We believe every contact is an opportunity, and that technology should maximize that opportunity without adding operational burden to teams.
about.visionText: We aim to become the reference platform for contact and collections automation in Latin America. Our goal is to redefine the industry standard by proving that traditional call center models and manual management can be replaced by AI-driven solutions that deliver better results with more efficient structures.
about.value1Desc: We don't insist more, we insist better. Every contact is designed to reach the right person at the right time with the right message, maximizing the chances of a positive response.
about.value2Desc: We don't layer AI on top of broken processes. We replace manual workflows at the root, building systems that operate autonomously and scale from day one.
about.value3Desc: Every decision we make is oriented toward reducing operational costs and increasing results. We don't measure success by activity, but by the real impact we generate on our clients' businesses.
about.teamSubtitle: A multidisciplinary team with experience in technology, product, and business development, focused on building AI solutions that generate real impact.

contact.heroSubtitle: We're ready to help. Write to us and we'll get back to you shortly.

contact.faq1Question: How long does it take to implement DeepContact?
contact.faq1Answer: A basic implementation can be ready in 48 hours. More complex setups with custom integrations may take 1 to 2 weeks.
contact.faq2Question: Do I need technical knowledge to use the platform?
contact.faq2Answer: No. DeepContact is designed to be intuitive. Our team guides you through the entire setup and training process.
contact.faq3Question: Do you offer a free trial?
contact.faq3Answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all platform features.

howPage.heroSubtitle: Automate outbound call campaigns with AI voice agents. No human intervention, real-time results.
howPage.overviewText: With DeepContact you can automate outbound call campaigns using AI voice agents that contact your clients automatically, hold natural conversations, record results in real time, and generate detailed reports and analytics. All without human intervention.
howPage.step1Subtitle: Phone number and AI voice agent
howPage.step1Text: We define together the number the system will call from and configure the AI voice agent for your use case. We can provision a number (USD 10 setup + USD 0.35/min) or integrate your existing SIP telephony. The agent is customized with name, objective, tone, and objection handling specific to your business.
howPage.step1Detail1: Own number or integrated SIP Trunk
howPage.step1Detail2: Custom AI voice agent (objective, tone, dynamic variables)
howPage.step2Text: You upload your contact list in CSV format with phone numbers and dynamic variables (name, amount, date, etc.). Then you configure the campaign: calling days and hours, number of retries, intervals between attempts, and manual or automatic start.
howPage.step3Text: Once the campaign is active, the system starts calling autonomously. From the platform you can monitor each call in real time, view detailed analytics, and export results. Each workspace supports 20 simultaneous calls, equivalent to approximately 1,200 calls per hour.
howPage.step3Detail2: Detailed analytics and metrics per campaign
howPage.weDoText: We take care of the entire setup so you don't have to worry about the technical side. You bring the use case and the contacts; we get everything up and running.
howPage.weDo3: AI voice agent implementation and testing
howPage.ctaDesc: Tell us your use case and we'll show you how DeepContact can automate your operation.

footer.description: Intelligent AI-powered voicebot to transform your company's customer service.
